title: Everything Voxy
description: This modpack makes Voxy run fast and smooth with full support for compatible shaders. 1.21.10–26.1.2
body:
### **Everything Voxy**
[![Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/everything-voxy?logo=modrinth&color=28a745&labelColor=555555)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/everything-voxy) 
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-Join%20Server-7289da?logo=discord&labelColor=555555)](https://discord.gg/D7U7J8H6Xb) [![YouTube](https://img.shields.io/badge/Subscribe-FF0000?style=flat&logo=youtube&logoColor=white&labelColor=FF0000)](https://www.youtube.com/@GGWoofXD) [![Patreon](https://img.shields.io/badge/Support_on_Patreon-FF424D?style=flat&logo=patreon&logoColor=white)](https://www.patreon.com/cw/GGWoof) [![Twitch](https://img.shields.io/badge/Follow_on_Twitch-9146FF?style=flat&logo=twitch&logoColor=white&labelColor=9146FF)](https://www.twitch.tv/ggwoofxd)



[![Sparked host use code EverythingVoxy for 25% off](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/MRCodERDude/EverythingVoxy@main/Artboard_3.png)
](https://billing.sparkedhost.com/aff.php?aff=3199)



![EV with shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pBFoZh84/images/0b7d207ea22454f81174f26fd41dc2d39fa8d6b0.png)
This modpack is built with one clear goal: making Voxy run as fast, smooth, and stable as possible while still supporting the shaders that are confirmed to work well with it. Every component in the pack is focused on optimization, reducing stutter, improving resource handling, and keeping performance consistent in all situations.

The pack avoids unnecessary features and instead prioritizes improvements that truly matter for responsiveness and frame stability. It remains lightweight and efficient while still allowing you to use visually impressive shaders that complement Voxy. Every configuration is tuned so the game loads faster, runs cooler, and stays stable even in demanding areas.

[Voxy](https://modrinth.com/mod/voxy) is the core of this modpack, and the entire setup is designed around enhancing its performance.

![EV with shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pBFoZh84/images/e0fcc3357eeb5809ef426a232612045c53e9b16d.png)

[![Sparked host use code EverythingVoxy for 25% off](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/MRCodERDude/EverythingVoxy@main/Artboard_1.png)
